# Code of Conduct

## Our standards

- Be respectful and direct.
- Assume good intent, critique ideas not people.
- Keep collaboration focused on reproducible technical outcomes.

## Unacceptable behavior

- Harassment, threats, personal attacks, or discriminatory language.
- Deliberate disruption of discussions or review processes.
- Publishing private information without consent.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, remove, or reject contributions and interactions that violate this policy.

## Reporting

Report incidents privately to the maintainers through repository security contacts or direct maintainer communication channels.
